mexico~southafrica.text: 32 years ago, Mexico exited the 1994 World Cup at the Round of 16, and we said goodbye to Jorge Campos’ extraordinary kits 🎨 https://t.co/hvw9k2agHn
mexico~southafrica.author: brfootball

bosniaherzegovina~canada.text: Co-hosts Canada are out of the World Cup after a historic run that ends at the Round of 16 🇨🇦 https://t.co/sbGk1DRaKb
bosniaherzegovina~canada.author: brfootball

bosniaherzegovina~canada.text:
Ismael Saibari was emotional after being subbed off with an injury against Canada.

He's Morocco's top scorer at this World Cup with three goals 💔 https://t.co/D0MiHFwbLr
bosniaherzegovina~canada.author: brfootball

paraguay~unitedstates.text:
🇧🇷 @DaniAlvesD2: first footballer EVER to win 40 trophies!

3x 🌍 UCL
2x 🌍 UEL
4x 🇪🇺 Supercup
3x 🌎 Club World Cup
6x 🇪🇸 La Liga
5x 🇪🇸 Supercup
5x 🇪🇸 CDR
1x 🇮🇹 Serie A
1x 🇮🇹 Cup
2x 🇫🇷 Ligue 1
2x 🇫🇷 Supercup
1x 🇫🇷 Cup
1x 🇫🇷 League Cup
2x 🌎 Confed Cup
2x 🌎 Copa America

🤯 Wow. https://t.co/eSv3SdGme1
